method: single expression-driven discovery; drug/trial data held out of all selection and scoring
CA9_recovery: fully mechanical — survived every filter with no manual call; RNA log2FC=6.02 (rank 1 of 12)
CD70_recovery: data-retained — immune_rho=0.118 (n.s.); CD70 sits on the tumour-intrinsic side of the immune filter and is kept on its own data, not by any manual override
immune_filter: data-driven: Spearman rho vs 16-marker leukocyte signature across 110 tumours; exclude rho>=0.40
immune_filter_validation: leukocyte markers separate cleanly (rho 0.48–0.83) from the surface candidates (all <0.30), giving a wide margin at the rho>=0.40 exclusion threshold
driver_overlap: 0/5 mutation drivers appear in the expression-derived surface/secreted set
